mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_career_plan.career_reports ( report_no, user_id, student_capability_id, target_job_profile_id, match_score, match_details, self_discovery, target_job, development_path, action_plan, ai_suggestions, status, is_editable ) VALUES ( #{reportNo}, #{userId}, #{studentCapabilityId}, #{targetJobProfileId}, #{matchScore}, #{matchDetails}::jsonb, #{selfDiscovery}::jsonb, #{targetJob}, #{developmentPath}::jsonb, #{actionPlan}::jsonb, #{aiSuggestions}, #{status}, #{isEditable} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, report_no, user_id, student_capability_id, target_job_profile_id, match_score, match_details, self_discovery, target_job, development_path, action_plan, ai_suggestions, status, is_editable, pdf_file_path, created_at::timestamp, updated_at::timestamp FROM ai_career_plan.career_reports WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, report_no, user_id, student_capability_id, target_job_profile_id, match_score, match_details, self_discovery, target_job, development_path, action_plan, ai_suggestions, status, is_editable, pdf_file_path, created_at::timestamp, updated_at::timestamp FROM ai_career_plan.career_reports WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, report_no, user_id, student_capability_id, target_job_profile_id, match_score, match_details, self_discovery, target_job, development_path, action_plan, ai_suggestions, status, is_editable, pdf_file_path, created_at::timestamp, updated_at::timestamp FROM ai_career_plan.career_reports WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
